data.title: feat: templates/ — starter templates for new content
data.description:
## Summary

Ready-to-use templates so creating new knowledge entries, decisions, and project files has zero friction.

## What

```
templates/
├── CLAUDE.md            # template directory router
├── decision-record.md   # ADR template
├── knowledge-entry.md   # learning/pattern template
└── project-status.md    # project tracking template
```

## Notes

* Templates are filled in by copy, not by mutation — source files stay as stubs
* [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) lists available templates so agents know what exists without reading all files
